summary: Completed testing of 5 issue fixes. All backend tests pass (12/12). Fixed Operator Audit Logs frontend route permission. All features verified working.

issues: Payment Methods percentages (46%, 30%, 18%, 6%) are MOCKED/hardcoded - not real data

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 issues verified fixed: 1) Services Manage button uses /management/* paths (verified in code and direct navigation). 2) Admin User Management shows users but NOT super_admin (verified - shows 0 Super Admins count). 3) Admin has users.view permission (verified via API). 4) Operator Audit Logs works without Access Denied (fixed frontend route, now shows 'Limited View' banner). 5) Operator Analytics shows personalized context banner. 6) Operator Sales Dashboard loads with data (payment methods are MOCKED).

services_manage_path.test: Services page 'Manage' button leads to /management/* paths
services_manage_path.details: Code verified - all managePath values use /management/ prefix. Direct navigation to /management/hotels works correctly.

admin_user_management_shows_users.test: Admin User Management shows users (admin, operator, employee, customer)
admin_user_management_shows_users.details: Admin sees 3 users total - admin@test.com, operator@test.com, customer@test.com

admin_user_management_hides_super_admin.test: Admin User Management does NOT show super_admin users
admin_user_management_hides_super_admin.details: Shows '0 Super Admins' count. superadmin@oryno.com not visible in user list.

admin_has_users_view_permission.details: Admin can access /api/users/ endpoint successfully (200 OK)

operator_audit_logs_no_access_denied.test: Operator Audit Logs page loads without 'Access Denied' error
operator_audit_logs_no_access_denied.details: Fixed frontend route - added 'operator' to requiredRoles. Now shows 'Activity Logs & Reports' with 'Limited View' banner.

operator_analytics_personalized.test: Operator Analytics page shows personalized context banner
operator_analytics_personalized.details: Shows 'Personalized Analytics for Your Organization' and 'Showing data filtered by your assigned services: banquet, event, events'

operator_sales_dashboard_loads.test: Operator Sales Dashboard loads with data
operator_sales_dashboard_loads.details: Shows 'Sales Dashboard - My Business' with 'Services: banquet, event, events'. Payment methods percentages are MOCKED.

mocked_data_note: Payment Methods percentages in Sales Dashboard (MTN Mobile Money 46%, Orange Money 30%, Card Payment 18%, Bank Transfer 6%) are MOCKED/hardcoded as noted by main agent
